termsAndConditions.heading: TERMS & CONDITIONS
termsAndConditions.subHeading: Welcome to Ayra Health Mix. By using our website (www.ayrahealthmix.com), you agree to the following terms:

sections.title: General
sections.description: This website is owned and operated by Ayra Health Mix. By placing an order, you agree to follow these terms.

sections.title: Products
sections.description: All products are homemade and prepared with care. We try to ensure product descriptions and images are accurate, but slight variations may occur.

sections.title: Orders
sections.description: Orders are confirmed only after communication via WhatsApp, phone, or email. We reserve the right to cancel or refuse any order.

sections.title: Pricing
sections.description: Prices are subject to change without notice. Final price will be confirmed during order confirmation.

sections.title: Payment
sections.description: Payment details will be shared during order confirmation. Orders will be processed only after payment confirmation (if applicable).

sections.title: Shipping & Delivery
sections.description: Delivery timelines will be shared during order confirmation. We are not responsible for delays caused by courier services.

sections.title: Returns & Refunds
sections.description: Due to the nature of food products, returns are not accepted. Refunds are only applicable if wrong product is delivered or the product is damaged during delivery.

sections.title: User Responsibility
sections.description: You agree not to misuse the website or provide false information.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
sections.description: We may update these terms at any time without prior notice.

privacyPolicies.heading: PRIVACY POLICY
privacyPolicies.subHeading: At Ayra Health Mix, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.description: We may collect: Name, Phone number, Email address, Delivery address.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.description: We use your data to: Process and confirm orders, Communicate via WhatsApp, phone, or email, Improve our services.

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.description: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties. Data may only be shared with delivery partners (for shipping).

sections.title: Data Security
sections.description: We take reasonable steps to protect your information. However, no online system is 100% secure.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.description: Our website may use basic cookies for better user experience.

sections.title: User Rights
sections.description: You can: Request your data, Ask us to delete your data.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.description: If you have any questions, contact us via: Phone: 93609 88964, Email: ayrahealthmix@gmail.com.

shippingPolicies.heading: SHIPPING POLICY
shippingPolicies.subHeading: At Ayra Health Mix, we ensure safe and timely delivery of our homemade products.

sections.title: Order Processing
sections.description: Orders are confirmed only after communication via WhatsApp, phone, or email. Once confirmed, orders are processed within 1–2 business days.

sections.title: Delivery Time
sections.description: Estimated delivery time: 2–5 business days depending on location. Delivery timelines will be shared during order confirmation.

sections.title: Shipping Charges
sections.description: Shipping charges (if any) will be informed during order confirmation. Charges may vary based on delivery location.

sections.title: Delivery Areas
sections.description: We currently deliver across selected locations in India. Please confirm availability before placing an order.

sections.title: Delays
sections.description: Delivery may be delayed due to courier issues, weather conditions, or unexpected situations. We are not responsible for delays caused by third-party delivery services.

sections.title: Incorrect Address
sections.description: Customers must provide accurate delivery details. We are not responsible for failed deliveries due to incorrect information.

sections.title: Order Tracking
sections.description: Tracking details (if available) will be shared via WhatsApp or email.

refundPolicies.heading: REFUND POLICY
refundPolicies.subHeading: At Ayra Health Mix, we deal with food products, so we follow strict quality and safety standards.

sections.title: No Return Policy
sections.description: Due to the nature of homemade food products, returns are not accepted.

sections.title: Refund Eligibility
sections.description: Refunds are only provided if you received the wrong product or the product is damaged during delivery.

sections.title: Proof Requirement
sections.description: Customers must provide photo or video proof within 24 hours of delivery.

sections.title: Refund Process
sections.description: Once verified, refund will be processed within 3–7 business days. Refund will be issued via the original payment method or agreed method.

sections.title: Non-Refundable Cases
sections.description: Refunds will not be provided if the customer does not like the taste, wrong address is provided, delay is caused by courier service, or the product is handled improperly after delivery.

sections.title: Order Cancellation
sections.description: Orders can be cancelled only before preparation starts. Once the product is prepared or shipped, cancellation is not allowed.

sections.title: Contact for Refunds
sections.description: For any issues, contact us via phone: 93609 88964 or email: ayrahealthmix@gmail.com.
